name: Warm Swiss Cheese, Mushroom, and Roasted Pepper Loaf
recipeIngredient: 2 Jars (7 oz each) Roasted Red Peppers, drained and patted dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Cut bread in half horizontally. Hollow out bottom half of loaf, leaving a 1/2 inch thick shell.
3. In a large skillet, melt butter; add garlic; cook and stir until slightly softened, about 1 minute.
4. Add mushrooms, salt, and black pepper; cook, stirring occasionally, until mushrooms are softened and liquid has evaporated, about 5 minutes. Set aside.
5. Arrange roasted red peppers in the bread shell.
6. Cut Swiss cheese to fit into the shell; place half of the cheese over the peppers.
7. Top with reserved mushroom mixture, remaining cheese, and the top of the bread.
8. Place on a baking sheet, cover loosely with foil tent, bake until cheese melts, about 5 minutes.
9. Cut into serving pieces, serve with knife and fork.
